flags.label: Private nonprofit associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Lackawanna College are 19% below the private nonprofit associate's-predominant peer median ($41.0k vs $50.8k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lackawanna College rose 19% between 2017 and 2020 ($15.2k → $18.1k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lackawanna College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (33.8% → 28.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lackawanna College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($9.7k → $11.2k).
